reasoning: On October 30, 2025, the market estimated a 15% probability of Bitcoin reaching $150K by the end of 2025. Given the knowledge cutoff is November 9, 2025, about 10 days have passed since the market estimate. With only approximately 52 days left in the year, the time remaining for a potentially large price movement has decreased, leading to slight time decay in the probability. Without access to real-time price data between Oct 30 and Nov 9, anchoring closely to the market's 15% estimate and applying a minor downward adjustment for time decay yields a reasonable forecast of 13%.
